Update the geolocation requirement settings for an event.
updateStatus(String, String, int) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.database.EntrantListFirebase
This method is used to change the set status of the entrant in the list for an event in the firestore db.
upsertEntry(String, EntrantListEntry) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.database.EntrantListFirebase
This method is used to update/add to the entrant list for an event in the firestore db.

UserComment - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem.model
Represents a comment made by a user on an event.

Empty constructor required for Firebase deserialization.
UserComment(String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.model.UserComment
Creates a user comment with text, user ID, and user name.

Creates a user comment and records whether the commenter is an organizer.
